result.stdout:
nuspec_tool v0.1.105.0
Copyright ©-2021 Topten Software. All Rights Reserved

Usage: nuspec_tool <nuspecfiles> <inputfiles>

  Updates the version attribute of any <dependency> elements in the 
  nuspec files by reading the version numbers from the <PackageReference>
  elements in the input files.

Options:
  --help         show this help, or help for a command
  --version      show version information

eg: To update a .nuspec file with package versions from a .csproj files:

  > nuspec_tool myproj.csproj myproj.nuspec
